raw_cv_text:
Rayan Akhtar
07961 576656 | Email: ra1422@ic.ac.uk | LinkedIn: rayan-akhtar | GitHub: RayanAkhtar | rayanakhtar.com
EDUCATION
Imperial College London | MEng Computing, First Class Honours Expected Sep 2022- Jun 2026
• Personal Programming Tutor, Personal Mathematics Tutor, Undergraduate Teaching Assistant
King Edwards VII Handsworth Grammar School for Boys Sep 2020 – Jun 2022
• A-Levels: A*A*A*A (Ranked 1st in Sixth form) in Maths, Further Maths, Computer Science and Economics.
EXPERIENCE
Solidatus | Software Engineer Intern Mar 2025 – Oct 2025
• Decreased job configuration time by 92% by automating connector setup through leveraging underlying
metadata to enablable the seamless integration of customer data with diverse data sources.
• Accelerated connector job execution times by 40% by optimising backend logic.
Virlo | Software Engineer Intern Jun 2025 – Sep 2025
• Cut yearly costs at an AI startup by £600 through the automation of changelog generation from commit history,
as well as GitHub diff summaries to ensure up-to-date release documentation for 1000+ users.
• Reduced support queries by 17% and slashed annual costs by £450 by introducing comprehensive API
documentation with OpenAPI and Swagger.
HeartFlow | Software Engineer Intern Jan 2025 – Mar 2025
• Increased image generation model accuracy by 10% through the development of a gamified web application
that facilitated data collection through labelling of real and AI-generated images.
• Slashed reporting time by 33% through the introduction of an interactive dashboard leveraging real-time
analytics, providing insights into performance for a deep learning model for image generation.
7Dxperts | Software Engineer Intern Jun 2024 – Sep 2024
• Leveraged data profiling techniques to evaluate data quality, uncovering inconsistencies and anomalies, which
resulted in a 23% improvement in data accuracy across the organisation.
• Lowered yearly costs by £1800 by engineering a virtual assistant leveraging RAG to provide guidance during
sales calls, enhancing caller effectiveness and improving sales conversions by 32%.
PROJECTS
BOSS Data Management System | C++, SQL Oct 2024 – Nov 2024
• Cut memory usage by 64% and enhanced runtime by 21% by implementing a lazy loader for SQL data sources.
• Elevated multi-kernel join performance by 37% through symmetric hash joins across different data sources.
StudyChain | JavaScript, React, D3.js, Neo4j, Firebase, Heroku May 2024 – Jun 2024
• Launched a full-stack website that visually organised module prerequisites, leading to a 35% reduction in
students' time spent understanding course requirements.
• Increased learner engagement by 28% through the engineering of an interactive D3.js knowledge tree.
WACC | Scala, Parsley Jan 2024 – Mar 2024
• Designed and deployed a compiler for the WACC programming language, significantly reduced runtime
through the implementation of graph colouring and dataflow analysis.
Pintos | C, Operating Systems, GDB Sep 2023 – Dec 2023
• Improved the overall runtime of programs on an operating system by 63% by introducing a BSD scheduler and
eliminated size restrictions on user applications through the integration of virtual memory.
CommCraft | Python, OpenAI, MIME, Pandas Dec 2023
• Slashed email generation time by 86% through automated templated email completion that leverages
conditional formatting as well as generative AI integrations to reduce manual input.
EXTRACURRICULAR
STEMM | Technical Lead & Treasurer Aug 2023 – Present
• Collaborated with technical partners and led events to connect students with internship opportunities.
• Managed budgets to enhance financial stability and securing sponsorships to build industry partnerships that
support organisational growth and visibility for a society with 600+ students.
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages - Python, C, C++, C#, Dart, Haskell, Kotlin, Java, Scala, JavaScript, Typescript, SQL, Rust.
Technologies – React.js, D3.js, Neo4j, Node.js, Next.js, Firebase, MongoDB, Supabase, LangChain, Tailwind CSS.
Tools – Git, GitHub, Heroku, Vercel, Unity, Linux, GDB, Cursor, JetBrains, VsCode, Docker, AWS, Postman.
